clean_name: ROUND LAB Sensitive Skin Calming Routine
how_to_use: 1) Dokdo CleanserDuring morning and evening cleansing, dispense a proper amount of cleanser, lather well, then gently massage the entire face and rinse clean with lukewarm water.2) Dokdo TonerAfter cleansing, dispense a proper amount onto a cotton pad, then gently wipe along the skin texture to refine the skin.3) Pine Calming Cica AmpouleAt the essence step, dispense a proper amount and gently pat it into the entire face until absorbed.4) Birch Juice Moisturizing CreamAt the final step of skincare, dispense a proper amount and gently pat it into the skin as if forming a moisture barrier.

why_we_love_it: The 100% undiluted capsule without dilution perfectly resets any skin concerns. Contains PDRN hyaluronic acids capsule 100 serum to improve damaged skin condition.100% satisfaction in feeling of use.
featured_ingredients_desc: Contains PDRN to help with elastic and smooth skincare, and collagen to help with strengthening skin barrier. Contains 11 types of hyaluronic acids to moisturize both inside and outside skin. Contains PDRN, hyaluronic acids, and collagen for moisturizing and hydration to provide instant improvement of inner skin moisturizing and moisture plumping effects. Your skin becomes possible to generate hyaluronic acids and collagen for deep moisturizing.
how_to_use: [Serum] Take an appropriate amount and spread evenly over the skin.[Mask]1. After cleansing, refine the skin texture with toner.2. Apply the sheet to fit the face.3. After 15~20 minutes, remove the sheet and gently pat the skin to help the remaining contents absorb.

why_we_love_it: Ceramide Shot Ampoule is a dense high-moisturizing skin barrier care product. This is a Full-Ceramide Ampoule that gives Full-moisturization to create a strong skin barrier with full-Ceramide. Depending on your skin condition, which changes daily, and concerns, we recommend a custom ampoule. This product is recommended for use on skin that feels dry, sensitive, and rough, and can add moisture to skin that feels overly dry and tight. This Ceramide Shot Ampoule is a high-moisturizing care ampoule with a high concentration of moisturizing ingredients recommended to apply every day.
featured_ingredients_desc: For those of you who are concerned about severe dryness, the focus is on ceramide ingredients. If you are worried about severe dryness that occurs frequently and skin texture that remains dry even after makeup, please pay attention to the representative of moisture care, ceramide ingredients which care for dry skin and make it moist. Ceramide helps protect the skin barrier and keep moisture retention, while also defending against external damage. Cerafull Complex™, containing three ceramide ingredients (ceramide EOP, ceramide NS, ceramide NP) for skin barrier care, is contained in one ampoule with 50,000 ppm for moist skin care. AMPLE:N's patented high-moisturizing ingredients for troubled skin include Forsythia Suspensa Fruit Extract (Arctigenin), which has a strong barrier-strengthening effect, and Allantoin, which has a calming effect on the skin. Completed the low skin irritation test and tested suitable for sensitive skin to use by excluding synthetic fragrances. The creamy texture of the serum, with its bright hue and full of ceramide ingredients, is luxuriously spread and finished off smoothly.
how_to_use: In the morning and evening, after the toner, apply a moderate amount all over the face and dab it to absorb. Gently tap the surface for a full moisturization. For double-moisturizing-layering, use the Ceramide Shot Ampoule and layer with the Ceramide Shot Cream.
